def negative_large_slice_copy_created_each_iteration_for_sliding_window():
    rule_id = "large_slice_copy_created_each_iteration_for_sliding_window"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag windowed algorithms that copy large slices every step instead of tracking indexes."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
